character.definition: a kind of turban used in ancient time
(a dialect) to open (a parcel; a bundle or a package); to unroll (a scroll, etc.); (Cant.) to rest, catch one's breath
(same as 䋌 堅) strong and durable, solid and firm; tight; pressing
to hear; to listen; to obey; to understand
wine, to brew a second time
(same as 顥) bright; luminous; hoary; white
hesitate to say, reluctant to speak
